description.en: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository. Merge changes from one branch into another.
description.de: Erstelle einen neuen Pull Request in einem GitHub-Repository. Führe Änderungen von einem Branch in einen anderen zusammen.
description.es: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository. Merge changes from one branch into another.
description.fr: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository. Merge changes from one branch into another.
description.ro: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository. Merge changes from one branch into another.
description.it: Create a new pull request in a GitHub repository. Merge changes from one branch into another.

vars.API_KEY: env:GITHUB_TOKEN|Get your personal access token from https://github.com/settings/tokens

description.en: The owner of the repository (username or organization).
description.es: El propietario del repositorio (nombre de usuario u organización).
description.fr: Le propriétaire du référentiel (nom d'utilisateur ou organisation).
description.ro: Proprietarul depozitului (nume de utilizator sau organizație).
description.it: Il proprietario del repository (nome utente o organizzazione).

description.en: The title of the pull request.
description.es: The title of the pull request.
description.fr: The title of the pull request.
description.ro: The title of the pull request.
description.it: The title of the pull request.

description.en: The contents of the pull request. Supports Markdown.
description.es: The contents of the pull request. Supports Markdown.
description.fr: The contents of the pull request. Supports Markdown.
description.ro: The contents of the pull request. Supports Markdown.
description.it: The contents of the pull request. Supports Markdown.

description.en: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented. For cross-repository pull requests, use 'username:branch' format.
description.es: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented. For cross-repository pull requests, use 'username:branch' format.
description.fr: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented. For cross-repository pull requests, use 'username:branch' format.
description.ro: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented. For cross-repository pull requests, use 'username:branch' format.
description.it: The name of the branch where your changes are implemented. For cross-repository pull requests, use 'username:branch' format.

description.en: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into. Usually 'main' or 'master'.
description.es: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into. Usually 'main' or 'master'.
description.fr: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into. Usually 'main' or 'master'.
description.ro: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into. Usually 'main' or 'master'.
description.it: The name of the branch you want the changes pulled into. Usually 'main' or 'master'.

description.en: Whether the pull request is a draft. Set to 'true' for draft PRs.
description.es: Whether the pull request is a draft. Set to 'true' for draft PRs.
description.fr: Whether the pull request is a draft. Set to 'true' for draft PRs.
description.ro: Whether the pull request is a draft. Set to 'true' for draft PRs.
description.it: Whether the pull request is a draft. Set to 'true' for draft PRs.

success.en: Pull request #{{PR_NUMBER}} created successfully! View it at {{PR_URL}}
success.de: Pull Request #{{PR_NUMBER}} erfolgreich erstellt! Ansehen unter {{PR_URL}}
success.es: Pull request #{{PR_NUMBER}} created successfully! View it at {{PR_URL}}
success.fr: Pull request #{{PR_NUMBER}} created successfully! View it at {{PR_URL}}
success.ro: Pull request #{{PR_NUMBER}} created successfully! View it at {{PR_URL}}
success.it: Pull request #{{PR_NUMBER}} created successfully! View it at {{PR_URL}}
